# Coding agent pilot playbook

## Purpose

Pilot coding agent in a controlled way before broad rollout.

## Pilot design

- choose a repository or team slice
- select a small number of use cases
- define allowed task categories
- define review expectations
- decide what telemetry or audit trail you need
- collect failures and prompt patterns

## Good first pilot tasks

- codebase exploration
- low-risk refactors
- test generation
- documentation updates
- bounded technical debt cleanup

## Questions to answer during the pilot

- where does the agent help most?
- where does it drift?
- what instructions improved outcomes?
- which tools were unnecessary?
- what review rubric caught the most issues?
